item.title: EU MiCA fully enforced from July 1, banning unlicensed crypto firms; roughly 80% of European CASPs expected to lose registration
SEC set to propose crypto safe harbor rule in July covering token offerings and certain on-chain financial activities
CLARITY Act misses July Senate target; August 7 becomes critical deadline for US digital asset market structure legislation
Circle wins final OCC approval for national trust bank, enabling federally regulated digital asset custody services
DTCC begins July pilot of tokenized securities trading with BlackRock, JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs among 50-plus participants
ESMA launches supervisory review of crypto custody operations across EU-licensed CASPs under MiCA framework
UK FCA sets stablecoin capital buffer at 1% of coins in circulation, diverging from EU MiCA requirements
JPMorgan prepares to accept Bitcoin and Ethereum as collateral for institutional cash loans held by approved custodians
GENIUS Act stablecoin implementation rules due July 18 as federal and state regulators begin notice-and-comment rulemaking
EU legislators review MiCA overhaul including potential repeal of ban on stablecoin interest payments
SEC packages three July crypto proposals covering token issuance, broker-dealer custody rules, and trading venue requirements
BlackRock amends Coinbase custody agreement to require 12-hour withdrawal window for digital assets
Securitize targets $400 million in acquisitions following public listing as tokenization market consolidates
Security researchers disclose cryptographic flaw that put an estimated $70 billion in crypto assets at risk; vulnerability now patched
